data.title: Artimus Robotics introduces new artificial muscles with over 2x mechanical output, seeking partners to evaluate technology in robotic markets requiring dexterity.
data.description: In Boulder, Colorado, on February 17, 2026, Artimus Robotics unveiled its latest line of contracting HASEL actuators. With advancements in material science and manufacturing techniques, the new actuators provide over 100% increase in mechanical output compared to previous versions.
CBOE VOLATILITY INDEX HITS OVER ONE-WEEK HIGH, LAST UP 1.25 POINTS AT 22.45

data.title: Street Smart launches Vision Suite™ at ATSSA 2026, offering total traffic control. Built from 25 years of experience.
data.description: COLUMBUS, MN - Street Smart has unveiled Vision Suite™ at the 2026 ATSSA Annual Convention & Traffic Expo. Drawing on over 25 years of traffic control expertise, the integrated technology platform was created by industry professionals familiar with the challenges of managing roadside operations. Vision Suite™ brings together signals, work management, and data analytics to streamline operations and enhance safety. This innovative solution addresses the pressing needs of the industry and offers a comprehensive approach to optimizing traffic management, benefitting countless stakeholders.

data.title: Scorpions to headline new residency in Las Vegas at PH Live, celebrating 60th anniversary, Sept. 17 - Oct. 3, 2026.
data.description: Hard rock legends, Scorpions, are set to make a comeback at PH Live at Planet Hollywood Resort & Casino in 2026 with a new headlining residency show. The event, titled Scorpions - Coming Home to Las Vegas, will be held from Thursday, Sept. 17 to Saturday, Oct. 3, 2026. Live Nation and Caesars Entertainment are promoting the show, which will include special guest performance by Buckcherry. This marks the band's fourth residency in Las Vegas, following three successful sold-out runs in the past.

data.title: Bluefin partners with Basis Theory for unified tokenization in payments, simplifying integration; no expansion of PCI scope.
data.description: Atlanta-based Bluefin, a prominent player in payment and data security infrastructure and PCI-validated point-to-point encryption (P2PE), revealed a key collaboration with Basis Theory, a cutting-edge API-centered tokenization and vaulting platform. This partnership allows enterprises to adopt a cohesive token strategy seamlessly across various payment environments like in-store, call center, online, and backend systems without triggering PCI scope expansion or adding integration challenges. This move aims to streamline payment processes for organizations and enhance data security.

data.title: Taoshi launches Vanta Trading, offering traders 100% simulated profit payouts via blockchain, with improved transparency.
data.description: Vanta Trading introduces a new offering to traders with 100% simulated profit payouts through blockchain technology, promising enhanced transparency and a simplified evaluation challenge. This development was announced by Taoshi, a notable player in decentralized finance operating on the Bittensor Network. The initiative aims to provide traders with a unique opportunity by leveraging blockchain for profit payouts.

data.title: Trualta reaches $100M in savings, recognizing caregivers as crucial in US healthcare system transformation.
data.description: Recent information highlights the significance of caregiver empowerment as federal initiatives enhance acknowledgment, compensation, and educational avenues. On February 17, 2026, in Kansas City, Missouri, Trualta, a prominent platform for caregiver education, assistance, and networking, revealed the latest developments. The data emphasizes the growing importance of caregivers, as federal programs expand support systems, leading to increased recognition, reimbursement, and training opportunities.

data.title: Alaska Airlines partners with PayCargo and IBS Software for integrated digital payment system in cargo business.
data.description: In a groundbreaking move, Alaska Airlines has become the pioneer airline to combine inbound and outbound payments for its cargo operations. This collaboration was announced in Coral Gables, Florida on February 17, 2026. The partnership involves PayCargo, a reputable logistics payment platform, and IBS Software, a prominent provider of SaaS solutions for the travel industry. This innovative integration marks a significant milestone for Alaska Airlines in streamlining its cargo business operations.

data.title: Batteries Plus partners with St. Jude for Power with Purpose, will donate $7 for each battery package sold. 37k trees planted, 2M+ batteries donated in year one.
data.description: The recently launched Power with Purpose campaign is aimed at providing research and support for children battling cancer. Batteries Plus has committed to donate $7 to St. Jude for every eligible battery package sold throughout February. Year one achievements include planting over 37,000 trees and contributing more than 2 million battery cells. The initiative is based in HARTLAND, Wis. and emphasizes the importance of aiding pediatric cancer patients.

data.title: Control Point Associates, Inc. acquires Borbas Surveying & Mapping, expanding NJ ops; enhancing tech, resources, service.
data.description: Control Point Associates has recently announced a major expansion of its operations in New Jersey through the acquisition of Borbas Surveying & Mapping. This move has bolstered their surveying capabilities significantly, offering clients access to improved technology, resources, and seamless service. The transaction, completed on February 17, 2026, marks a strategic growth for Control Point Associates in the region, positioning them as a leading provider in the industry. With the integration of Borbas Surveying & Mapping, the company aims to enhance its offerings and solidify its presence in the market.

data.title: Helient Technologies partners with Laurel AI to revolutionize attorney timekeeping for law firms.
data.description: A tech company in Haddonfield, New Jersey, Helient Technologies, LLC, shared news on February 17, 2026, of its collaboration with Laurel Inc. This partnership involves the expertise of Helient Technologies in cloud adoption and modern desktop solutions tailored for law firms, combined with Laurel Inc.'s unique offerings. Helient Technologies is known as a top IT services firm and Microsoft Solutions Partner. This collaboration aims to leverage each company's strengths to provide innovative solutions to the market.

data.title: StarkWare integrates EY Nightfall for private payments on Ethereum, offering DeFi access. Auditability preserved.
data.description: StarkWare is incorporating EY's Nightfall privacy protocol into Starknet to provide institutions with confidential payments and access to DeFi on public Ethereum-compatible platforms, all while maintaining transparency. This integration aims to cater to a wider audience and enable approximately 100 million transactions per year, demonstrating the increasing significance of privacy and security in the blockchain industry.

data.title: MasterSpas marks 30 years in business with new brand identity, highlighting innovation in the global spa industry.
data.description: A business based in Fort Wayne, Indiana, known as MasterSpas, is commemorating its 30th anniversary in the industry. Established in February 1996 by Bob Lauter and a team of investors, the company has achieved significant milestones over the three decades. This includes a focus on innovation, domestic production, and expansion within the global spa sector. The journey of MasterSpas reflects a successful venture that has withstood the test of time, showcasing perseverance and commitment to growth.

data.title: Green Mountain College campus in Vermont to be donated by Raj Peter Bhakta to Catholic mission-based group.
data.description: Entrepreneur Raj Peter Bhakta, who is currently stewarding a significant property, has announced a generous donation initiative called "The Gift." Bhakta, the owner of the renowned former Green Mountain College in Poultney, Vermont, has unveiled his plan on February 17, 2026. This philanthropic act is meant to benefit the community, with the specifics of the donation yet to be disclosed.

data.title: DDC Group and MindMap Digital form strategic partnership to accelerate a new era of F&A. AI-led BPM and AI Architects join forces.
data.description: A collaboration has been formed between The DDC Group, a pioneer in AI-driven operations, and MindMap Digital, an expert in AI consulting, to propel a fresh phase of finance and accounting (F&A) services. The partnership, unveiled in Evergreen, Colorado, on February 17, 2026, marks a significant step forward in this initiative. The DDC Group, specializing in AI technologies, joins forces with MindMap Digital, renowned for its consulting services around AI. This strategic alliance is anticipated to drive advancements in F&A by leveraging the capabilities and expertise of both companies.

data.title: 60% of prospective graduate students unaware of upcoming federal student loan changes, College Ave survey finds.
data.description: In a recent survey by College Ave, it was found that a significant number of potential graduate students see an advanced degree as essential for their professional advancement. The national study, released on February 17, 2026, highlights a lack of knowledge among these students about the upcoming opportunities in the field. The survey indicates that a large portion of prospective graduate students may not be fully informed about the options available to them. This suggests a need for better dissemination of information to help these individuals make more informed decisions about their education and careers.

data.title: Infleqtion, a quantum company using neutral-atom technology, goes public on NYSE with ticker symbol "INFQ" after merging with Churchill X.
data.description: Infleqtion, a renowned company in quantum computing and sensing utilizing neutral-atom technology, has officially been listed on the New York Stock Exchange as a publicly traded entity. Trading under the ticker symbol "INFQ," the company's merger with Churchill Capital Corp X, a special purpose acquisition firm, has been successfully concluded. The backing from Churchill X's investors was substantial, facilitating Infleqtion's debut on the NYSE.
